title: pimpinella tragium var. glauca
intro: Pimpinella tragium var. glauca, also known as burnet saxifrage, is a perennial plant species belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae) and native to Europe and Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Pimpinella tragium var. glauca can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to treat colds, sore throats, and respiratory issues.
